_source.mappingGuide: Replicating Employee Master Data from Employee Central to SAP ERP HCM Using SAP Cloud Integration as the Middleware (For Implementation Started Before Q2 2017)
_source.processGuide: Replicating Employee Master Data and Organizational Assignments from Employee Central to SAP ERP HCM
_source.addOn: PA_SE_IN (SFSF EC INTEGRATION); ECS4HCM for SAP HCM for S/4HANA
_source.caveat: The field-level mapping only exists in the LEGACY pre-BIB guide. The current guide has no per-infotype mapping chapters, because under the Business Integration Builder the mapping is configured per customer in Transformation Templates. Treat this as SAP's documented baseline, not as what any given system does.
_source.licence: Facts restated from published SAP guides and authored by hand. SAP's prose and table layouts are not reproduced; automated extraction is prohibited by their terms.

_chain.title: How the data gets here

steps.what: ABAP report in ERP. Reads your Customizing and triggers the pull.
Outbound web service — sends the query to SAP Cloud Integration.
SuccessFactors-side API that Cloud Integration calls to read the EC data.
Inbound web service in ERP. Writes to staging and raises SAP_SFIOM_EE_ORGAS_RPPQ_CREATED.
Transformation Templates map each EC field to an infotype field — this part is configured per customer.
The infotype record is created or updated.

_chain.note: One program covers every in-scope infotype — there is no separate service per table. Organizational objects use RH_SFIOM_ORG_OBJ_REPL_QUERY; cost centres replicate the other way, ERP to EC, via ODTF_REPL_CC.

PA0002.name: Personal Data
PA0002.ecObject: Biographical Information · Personal Information · National ID Card
